overview.description: The Man Active High Yield ETF (MHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund actively manages a portfolio of high yield bonds of different maturities. It includes bonds from domestic and foreign issuers MHY was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by Man.
